name: Onion and Cheese Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound grated Swiss or Gouda cheese
recipeInstructions:
NOTE 1: All ingredients should be very cold.
DOUGH: Cut the butter into the flour and salt until it resembles a coarse meal. Stir in the soda. Knead just to combine. Wrap in plastic film and refrigerate for 1 hour.
On a floured board, roll out the dough, fold it into thirds, and chill for 1 hour.
FILLING: Cook the onions in butter until translucent. Let them cool. Stir flour into the cheese. Blend eggs, cream, and seasonings (salt, pepper, nutmeg).
Roll out the dough and place it in a quiche pan. Spread the onions in the bottom. Spread the cheese mixture on top. Pour the cream and eggs over the cheese.
Bake in a pre-heated 350°F oven for 20 minutes. Turn down the heat to 300°F and bake another 35 minutes.
